name: Dining room
description: Communal eating space anchored by a long central table with chairs on both long sides, a hanging lantern chandelier above the table center, an open beamed ceiling that keeps the room airy, and small touches (flower pot, barrel for tableware) that signal everyday use.

required_furniture.rule: Run of @primary blocks centered along the room's long horizontal axis at y = floor + 1.
Stairs blocks (@stairs) facing the table, distributed evenly on both long sides — minimum 2 per side.
One minecraft:lantern hanging from a small @primary cluster attached to the ceiling, directly above the table center.
Centerpiece on the table; in tight rooms set off-axis from the chandelier.
Tableware storage placed against an interior wall corner, clear of the seating area.

placement_rules: Leave at least one cell between table and long walls so chairs fit
Barrel sits against an interior corner, never blocking a chair
lighting_ventilation: Primary light source is the hanging lantern over the table; the open beamed ceiling lets daylight (or torchlight from adjacent rooms) seep in between beams.

medieval.notes: Heavy oak refectory table; sturdy stair-chair benches; iron lantern above.

modern.notes: Minimalist quartz table, low stone chairs, redstone-lamp-like lantern fitting.

fantasy.notes: Long dark-oak feasting table fit for a great hall; lantern as enchanted chandelier.
